page_metadata.biotools__summary: The 2D semiconductor database (2DSdb) provides an ideal platform for computational modeling and design of new 2D semiconductors and heterostructures in photocatalysis, nanoscale devices, and other applications.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The 2D semiconductor database (2DSdb) provides an ideal platform for computational modeling and design of new 2D semiconductors and heterostructures in photocatalysis, nanoscale devices, and other applications.
